message:
fix(core): shell-escape CWD in custom agent command templates

Custom agent command templates from config used raw string replacement
for {cwd} without shell escaping, allowing command injection via
crafted directory names (e.g., /tmp/foo$(whoami)). The default agent
commands already used shell_escape() correctly, but custom templates
bypassed it. Apply shell_escape() to the CWD substitution in custom
templates to match the safe pattern.

21,281 lib tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
